holdings.infoBox: HWAY is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Quanta Services stock at 5.08%, Caterpillar at 4.82%, Union Pacific at 4.53%, CSX Corporation at 4.52%, and Emerson Electric Co. at 4.11%.

overview.description: The Themes US Infrastructure ETF (HWAY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index that provides exposure to US companies associated broadly with infrastructure. HWAY was launched on Sep 12, 2024 and is issued by Themes.
